quote: Before this, AI felt like magic I was supposed to already understand. The mental models broke it into pieces I could actually think through - and explain to my friends without sounding like I was reading from a textbook.
name: Priya Sharma

quote: I had sat through plenty of ML lectures that jumped straight to formulas. The free session was different - we talked through how things work, asked messy questions, and left with frameworks I still use when I am reading papers or debugging code.
name: Arjun Mehta

quote: Vendor demos all sound the same until you know what questions to ask. Verlin Labs gave me a way to evaluate AI features honestly - what they can do, where they break, and what my team actually needs - without pretending I have a PhD.
name: Sarah Chen

quote: My daughter used to nod along when people talked about AI. Now she pushes back thoughtfully - she asks why something works, not just whether it works. That shift in how she thinks is what I cared about most.
name: Rajesh Kumar

quote: I am an EE student, not a CS major, so I expected to feel behind. Instead, the focus on intuition and clear structure helped me reason about transformers and LLMs in a way that finally stuck - not just for an exam, but for actual projects.
name: David Okonkwo

quote: I came to the free session skeptical - another AI workshop, I assumed. I left with a plain-language map of what my team should learn first, what to ignore for now, and how to talk about risk without shutting down good ideas.
name: Maria Gonzalez
